title: Psychodreams RidingMouseFix
description: Fixes the sluggish mouse feeling when riding a minecart, or any other entity.
body:
When riding minecarts (and some other entities) in vanilla Minecraft, moving the mouse feels:
- **Sluggish and unresponsive**
- **Inconsistent and jerky**
- Like the cursor is "fighting" against your movements

This mod completely eliminates this issue, providing smooth and responsive mouse control.
